# `!file`

**Category:** files

Manage the state of a file, directory entry, or symlink on the target. Set attributes (mode, owner, group) or remove the path.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `path` | string | yes | Target filesystem path. |
| `remove` | bool | no | If true, delete the path. Templated as a boolean at evaluate time. |
| `attributes` | map | no | File attributes: mode, owner, group, etc. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !file
  path: /etc/motd
  attributes:
    mode: '0644'
```

```yaml
- !file
  path: /tmp/old
  remove: yes
```
